provenance.source_corpus: A test of the umbrella species approach in restored floodplain ponds

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:5ad293d7db98
edges.original_sentence: Positive relationships were identified between coho abundance and biomass and species richness, abundance and biomass of fish and listed species.

source_spans.text: Positive relationships were identified between coho abundance and biomass and species richness, abundance and biomass of fish and listed species.

source_document.title: A test of the umbrella species approach in restored floodplain ponds

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:5ad293d7db98
edges.original_sentence: There was a significant negative relationship between the abundance of fish and that of coho, however, when threespine stickleback were excluded from the model that relationship became positive

source_spans.text: There was a significant negative relationship between the abundance of fish and that of coho, however, when threespine stickleback were excluded from the model that relationship became positive

source_document.title: A test of the umbrella species approach in restored floodplain ponds

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:5ad293d7db98
edges.original_sentence: Benthic invertebrate species richness decreased significantly as coho abundance and biomass increased

source_spans.text: Benthic invertebrate species richness decreased significantly as coho abundance and biomass increased

source_document.title: A test of the umbrella species approach in restored floodplain ponds

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:43d727ddbff5
edges.original_sentence: Salmonids, including coho, were clustered on the negative side of axis 1, which was characterized by higher elevation, more wood, groundwater inputs, lower maximum temperatures and less aquatic vegetation.
